metadata.description: Product engineering skills for Claude Code: ship marketing content, review design, audit repos, and keep dependencies safe.

plugins.name: blogger
plugins.description: Turn shipped commits into dated blog posts, changelog entries, and social snippets in your site's own voice.

plugins.name: design-review
plugins.description: Review a UI for conversion, UI/UX, accessibility, performance, and SEO against Apple, FT, and OpenAI design standards — and strip AI design slop.

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: Whole-repo quality, coverage, CI, security, and AI-agent fragility audit, ranked by production risk.

plugins.name: warden
plugins.description: Patch security alerts and bump dependencies safely, verified by your own build and tests, in one clean PR.
